series_metadata.series_description: Provides summary informaiton about activity per- formed by lab personnel. Information includes number of samples tested and demorgaphic and geogrkaphic data is well as other related information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office for five years, then contact the State Arcives, if interested, transfer to the State A rchive; if not, then compile infor- mation into a yearly report then destroy., Paper: Archives
